project_area: Health equity, racial and health disparities, COVID-19 impact mitigation
demographic_requirements: Focus on minority and marginalized communities in New Jersey, including BIPOC, African American, LatinX/Hispanic, homeless, migrant seasonal farmworkers, and other vulnerable underserved populations
eligibility_summary: No explicit grant funding or application process is described; this appears to be a task force report and public hearing initiative rather than a grant program. Eligibility is not applicable as it is a state-led effort to study and address health disparities.
